summary: Frontend UI verification of WooProducts header readability fix. Login as QA tester (admin@creook.fr password unavailable in memory), navigated to /produits-boutique. Header now displays a vivid blue gradient banner with ultra-bold white text — fully readable without hover. Table row data could not be visually verified because QA tester operator has 0 products in marcherbien.fr store, but CSS class analysis confirms no hover dependency for text visibility.
passed: Header banner background = linear-gradient(rgb(37,99,235) -> rgb(30,64,175)) — vivid blue as intended (from-blue-600 to-blue-800)
H1 'Produits Boutique WooCommerce' — color rgb(255,255,255), fontWeight 900 (font-black), fontSize 36px — perfectly readable without hover
Subtitle 'Gérez vos produits WooCommerce...' — color rgb(255,255,255), fontWeight 700 (font-bold), fontSize 18px — readable without hover
Header icon container background = rgb(255,255,255) (white) with blue ShoppingCart icon — visible on blue banner
Screenshot confirms header is highly prominent and legible with no interaction required
Code review (WooProducts.jsx L238-336) confirms base row classes use text-white/font-bold for product name, SKU, price — hover:bg-zinc-800/50 only affects background, not text color/visibility

failed.issue: QA tester (operator role) has 0 products in the marcherbien.fr WooCommerce store; empty state 'Aucun produit trouvé' shown. Could not visually confirm 'Non mappé', SKU, Prix readability on real data rows.
failed.evidence: tbody tr count = 0 on /produits-boutique. admin@creook.fr password not in /app/memory/test_credentials.md, so could not test with admin who has synced products.

action_items: If user wants full visual QA of table rows without hover, provide admin@creook.fr password OR run 'Synchroniser WooCommerce' as an admin so products appear for a test operator. Static code review indicates the fix is correctly applied (no hover dependency for text).

success_rate.frontend: 100% for header fix; table rows verified via code review only
